name: tibco-vectordb-hybrid-search
title: Hybrid Search
description: Hybrid dense+BM25 search. Alpha=1 is pure vector, Alpha=0 is pure keyword.

display.description: Hybrid dense+sparse search for improved RAG recall

display.name: VectorDB Connection
display.description: Select the VectorDB connector to use

display.name: Default Collection
display.description: Fallback collection name when not provided in the activity input

display.name: Default Top-K
display.description: Default number of results when not provided in the activity input

input.name: filters
input.schema: {"type": "object", "description": "Key-value filter map. Keys are payload field names. Values can be string, number, boolean, or array (for 'in' match). Example: {\"category\":\"tech\",\"year\":2024,\"tags\":[\"rag\",\"llm\"]}", "additionalProperties": true}

output.name: results
output.schema: {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "properties": {"id": {"type": "string", "description": "Document ID"}, "score": {"type": "number", "description": "Similarity score (0-1 for cosine)"}, "content": {"type": "string", "description": "Source text"}, "payload": {"type": "object", "description": "Metadata key-value pairs"}}}}
